title: GOTS Spooky, Scary & Horror Pack
description: a modpack designed to be spooky with a bunch of scary mods, including Herobrine, Cave Dweller, Weeping Angels. Etc. This pack also includes shaders and optimization as well with VR support. Perfect to play during October!
body:
## GOTS Spooky & Maybe a Little Scary Pack With VR Support

This Scary, Horror, Spooky pack is perfect to play during October or if you are in the mood for something scary! 

This is the pack that GOTS Gaming will use in their scary Minecraft series.
(if we even make it)



Please ***Subscribe*** to our YouTube Channel to support us!!!

## ***[youtube.com/@GOTS](https://www.youtube.com/@GOTS?sub_confirmation=1)***

![GOTS on YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/096cf7044063add5589446fef54a090a8ea903c1.png)




## Scary Shaders

![Scary Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9cec386ca1eda1962008b9371b64654d311e1a.png)

## **This is a singleplayer world...** How did you...

![Whos is this?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1a5e211b616db8416d0062fe632b3691cd050ec.png)


## Spooky Crypts

![Crpyts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be80ede1c57c5fdbca0aba46e3eaac5b599f1a0a.png)


## Cool Caves
![Mushroom Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a27306fd7f36b2321125cc9803c152ceba8eb580.png)
this pack features a bunch of performance mods and a bunch of spooky mods.

have any ideas on what we should add? comment on our most recent video and we might add it.





main mods:

Herobrine datapack by: LunarEclipseStudios

Weeping Angels by: Suff99

Cave Dweller by: alessandrv

Dark Waters by: AzureDoom
